spouse.name: Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain

zh.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain是Peredur ap Ednowain和Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain的兒子，出生在威爾士。他於1175年之前與Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain在威爾士結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain是Peredur ap Ednowain和Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain的儿子，出生在威尔士。他于1175年之前与Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain在威尔士结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Iorwerth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from iōr‘ ‘lord’ + a mutated form of berth ‘handsome’; borne in the Mabinogi by the jealous brother of Madawg , son of Maredudd . Iorwerth came to be regarded as a Welsh equivalent of Edward , but it has no actual connection with that name.

variants.name: Yorath
meanings: Anglicized form of   Iorwerth   or, in some cases, a transferred use of the surname derived from it.

en.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain was born in Wales as the son of Peredur ap Ednowain and Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. He married Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain before 1175, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain est né à Galles, fils de Peredur ap Ednowain et Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. Il a épousé Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain avant 1175, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain wurde in Wales, als Sohn von Peredur ap Ednowain und Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain geboren. Er hat vor 1175 in Wales Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain è nato il nel Galles come figlio di Peredur ap Ednowain e Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. Lui sposato Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain prima del 1175, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap EdnowainはウェールズでPeredur ap EdnowainとMrs Peredur ap Ednowainの息子として生まれた。1175年以前にウェールズでMrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain(은)는 웨일스에서 Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1175년 이전 웨일스에서 Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain nasceu em Gales filho de Peredur ap Ednowain e Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. Ele casou-se com Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain antes 1175, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain родился в местности Уэльс. Его родителей звали Peredur ap Ednowain и Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain перед 1175 г. в местности Уэльс. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain nació en Gales como hijo de Peredur ap Ednowain y Mrs Peredur ap Ednowain. Se casó con Mrs Iorwerth ap Peredur ap Ednowain antes de 1175, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
